reuse_curve.description: Target fraction of nonce lemmas in each new story that should be drawn from the existing lexicon (not newly invented). This is a guideline, not a hard rule — individual stories may vary. Lower reuse = more new vocabulary, higher reuse = denser cross-referencing. The curve shifts upward as the project matures and the lexicon grows.
reuse_curve.adjustment_note: These are starting values. Alessio adjusts as the project evolves. Early phase favors lower reuse (more world-building). Later phases favor higher reuse (denser semantic web, faster reader comprehension).

verb_past.rule: -ara after consonant, -ra after vowel; English -ed also permitted for euphony

verb_participle.rule: -ith (formal) or English -ing (when used with English auxiliaries)

morphological_rules.notes: Zero-derivation (conversion) is permitted: a noun may be used verbally or an adjective may be used nominally, following natural English patterns. When nonce morphology would create unpronounceable clusters, English-style inflection (-ed, -ing, -ly) is preferred.

story_0.text:
In the brolm of a drussik velune, where the venquaren quelthane thendarara through the gelvon, there was a quelith that no one could ornique. It had sulvekara from the marrath — vrenelu, the way all grothik drossiken sulvek — and it brasheled against the shendir with a thengar pellumom that the pralune themselves could not grothen.

The zilmara of those jorvunden was morvasse. Every torvak, every felgor that had melvired across the ondrev, keltharara something brendive into the crullenis halquen. And the halquen tremiquera. It tremiquera dorsmil, as if the nurithek of the bressiv had quelithara it from within, and the brolm — the sulvane brolm with its drussik velune — halvornara once more.

No one vrisora why. The plenviren were olpheque about it, trelvik zandiqueing their savendri in the kethane that drovainera above the thuravel. But a dranqet genvasse quelmara. And when it quelmara, the vorelm vossimer of the drossik — which had been pelnare for so many jorvunden that the brolm itself had nuvessera — grothened.

It grothened janvirely. The ulmaren melvired. And from inside the quelith, from the very thengarath of its pellumom, the felgoren began to ornique what had sulvekara from the marrath: that the venquaren, thendaraing quelthane through the gelvon, were not venquaren at all, but the brendive zilmara of a krelith halquen, prothelu tremiqueing into brolm.
story_0.title: The Brolm

expansion_log.notes: Story 0 created with 58 nonce lemmas (25 nouns, 15 verbs, 12 adjectives, 6 adverbs). All concepts null — meanings to be discovered through future expansion.
